title: Sub-items: more features that would be useful to us
excerpt:
Hi, 
I have some feature requests for sub-items that I couldn’t find elsewhere. 

Link to sub-items from another board
Paste a list to sub-items (for example, from excel)
Reflect information from sub-items in the column …

posts.author: JustinVR_SCF (Justin van Ryneveld)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
I have some feature requests for sub-items that I couldn’t find elsewhere.

  1. Link to sub-items from another board
  2. Paste a list to sub-items (for example, from excel)
  3. Reflect information from sub-items in the column of a parent (for example, summary of sub-items status)

Please let me know if these features already exist or are planning on being implemented.
Cheers,
Justin

posts.author: sandra (Sandra Salumbides)
posts.cookedHtml:
Other features for sub-items our team are looking for:

  • Duplicate a sub-item from one main item to another and move them around
  • Turn a main item to a sub item and vide versa
